name: Shrimp & Scallop Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sea Scallops, Cut in Half
2 tbsp Crystalized Ginger or 1 1/2 tsp Ground Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein shrimp.
2. Drain pineapple chunks.
3. If available, use imported soy sauce for better flavor; otherwise, use domestic soy sauce.
4. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and onion powder; mix well.
5. Add shrimp and scallops to the bowl. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
6. Prepare bamboo skewers by soaking them in water for 1 hour, or use metal skewers.
7. Thread shrimp, scallops, pineapple, and zucchini onto the prepared skewers.
8. Grill or broil the kabobs for 3 to 6 minutes per side, basting frequently with marinade.
9. Refrigerate leftovers.
